title: Fix text contrast issues across all sections

requirements.text: Audit and fix all text contrast issues across every section of the site (Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, Footer) so that no text blends into its background. Ensure all text colors have sufficient contrast against their respective backgrounds, adjusting foreground colors, adding text shadows, or changing background overlays as needed to make every word crisp and legible.

quotes: i still see some of the text blending in with the background can you please fix that for me

acceptanceCriteria: All body text, headings, labels, and UI text are clearly readable against their backgrounds throughout the entire page
No text in the Hero section blends into the background image — add overlays or text shadows if needed
Navigation links and logo text are fully legible against the nav bar background
Service cards, About section text, and Contact section text all have sufficient contrast
Footer text is readable against the footer background
Orange-on-white and white-on-dark combinations maintain strong contrast
No text appears faded, washed out, or difficult to read at any section

constraints: Do not change layout, structure, or content — only fix text/background color contrast
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
nonGoals: Redesigning the color palette or brand identity
